title: Longest Arithmetic Subsequence of Given Difference
hints: Consider processing the array from left to right. For each element, what previous element would extend a valid arithmetic sequence ending at it?
Use a hash map to store the length of the longest arithmetic subsequence ending at each specific value encountered so far.
For each element x, check if x - difference exists in the map. If so, the new length is map[x - difference] + 1; otherwise, it is 1.
